title: Pregnancy negates thyroid hormone-induced pyrexia
author: Oelkrug, Rebecca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The source data file contains the individual-level data underlying all quantitative results reported in this study. This includes measurements of maternal core and surface temperatures, serum hormone and metabolite concentrations (e.g., T3, FGF21, C-peptide, glucose), tissue weights, gene expression data from qPCR, protein abundance from Western blot analyses, histological quantifications, glycogen content, and glucose tolerance test results. Each dataset is organized by figure and panel, with individual animals represented as single data points. These source data support all statistical analyses and graphical representations presented in the main figures and supplemental material.  
 The supplemental data file contains supplemental figure 1 and 2.
